Best Budget Pick — Kitchen

Cascade Complete Powder Dishwasher Detergent, Fresh Scent, 75 oz, White

★★★★★4.8 0 reviews Category: Kitchen
Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026
🛒 Buy on Amazon Free shipping with Prime
Also available at
Walmart

Steve's Verdict: Best Budget Pick

Cascade Complete powder dishwasher detergent (75 oz, fresh scent): unbeatable streak-free clean, huge savings vs pods. Honest review + why I ditched pods forever. Pros/cons + bulk value.

📝 Steve's Personal Notes

"Dishwasher detergent is one of those things you really don’t want to gamble on – spots, streaks, filmy residue, or worse, pods that don’t fully dissolve and end up gunking up your machine over time."

Steve's Photo Proof

Every product on SteveGet is owned and tested by Steve. Here's the proof:

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Unbeatable streak-free, spot-free results – dishes sparkle every time
  • Powder dissolves 100% instantly – no slimy pod membranes clogging pump/drain
  • Huge 75 oz box lasts months – massive cost savings vs pods
  • No waste – scoop exactly what you need per load
  • Handles tough grease/baked-on food without pre-scrubbing
  • Reliable Cascade quality – never lets you down
  • Fresh scent enhances the clean feel without being fake

❌ Cons

  • Powder can create a bit of dust when scooping (use in dry sink area)
  • Larger box takes more cabinet space (but worth it for the savings)
  • Not as "convenient" as pre-measured pods for some (though I prefer the control & savings)

Key Specifications

fresh scent
75 oz box
powder formula
no pre-rinsing needed
streak-free shine
fights hard water stains
dissolves completely
great on baked-on food and grease

Where to Buy

The Cascade Complete Powder Dishwasher Detergent, Fresh Scent, 75 oz, White is available from these trusted retailers. Pick the one you prefer — same great product, your choice of store.
